_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of basic reconnaissance activity concepts and techniques (foot printing, scanning and enumeration).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of computer vision task taxonomy, including image classification, object detection, segmentation, pose estimation, and generation, and the architectures appropriate for each.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.386), AI-K-023 (AI, cosine: 0.368).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.382). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [activity, basic, concepts, enumeration, foot, printing] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, architectures, classification, computer, detection, estimation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.883, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (89.5%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of basic reconnaissance activity concepts and techniques (foot printin" and "Knowledge of computer vision task taxonomy, including image classification, obje". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.401 ≈ STS 0.382 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [activity, basic, concepts, enumeration, foot, printing]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, architectures, classification, computer, detection, estimation].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 89.5% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
